title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Nucleus Software International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Nucleus Software International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Nucleus Software International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Nucleus Software International Enterprises:
Nucleus Software International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nucleus Software International Enterprises!
